nasb.text: And Abijam slept with his fathers and they buried him in the city of David; and Asa his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Abijam slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David. And Asa his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 亞比央與他的列祖同睡，人們把他埋葬在大衛城裡，他的兒子亞撒繼承他作王。

ccb.text: 亚比央与祖先同眠后葬在大卫城，他儿子亚撒继位。
